## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Jay_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "The app has made it impossible to login. After entering your email, there's no option to use your password. You get emailed a 6 digit code.... That doesn't work. After double, triple checking the code matches the email sent. Nope. "PLEASE TRY AGAIN WITH A NEW CODE." This has been an issue for several months. Very embarassing to see from a company as large as Strava. Two thumbs down 👎"
            2. _Tom B_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "The app seems to have an issue that causes it to crash when the native camera app is used. With Strava running in the background you don't know it's crashed and stopped tracking. Phone is Pixel 10"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 20, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Oliver Valente_, Jul 20, 2026, 2/5: "Mostly ads. so many upgrade pop ups and annoying ads. as if collecting our location and fitness data free of charge wasn't enough."
